mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(oper_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayCount, COALESCE(AVG(cost_time), 0) AS avgCostTime FROM sys_oper_log WHERE
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_oper_log WHERE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC
SELECT title AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_oper_log WHERE GROUP BY title ORDER BY value DESC, title ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, title, business_type, method, request_method, oper_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_param, json_result, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time FROM sys_oper_log WHERE ORDER BY id DESC
